headline: 把 GitHub 上分散的 AI 开源信号整理成一份适合每天快速浏览的精选清单。
summary: 系统会优先选择最近仍在活跃推进、定位清晰、不是资源集合类噪音仓库的 AI 开源项目，并提供中文摘要、标签和推荐理由。

projects.name: holaOS
projects.description: An Open Agent Computer for ANY digital work.
projects.summaryZh: An Open Agent Computer for ANY digital work. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: 9router
projects.description: Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits.
projects.summaryZh: Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。

projects.name: omlx
projects.description: LLM inference server with continuous batching & SSD caching for Apple Silicon — managed from the macOS menu bar
projects.summaryZh: LLM inference server with continuous batching & SSD caching for Apple Silicon — managed from the macOS menu bar 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: hamilton
projects.description: Apache Hamilton helps data scientists and engineers define testable, modular, self-documenting dataflows, that encode lineage/tracing and metadata. Runs and scales everywhere python does.
projects.summaryZh: Apache Hamilton helps data scientists and engineers define testable, modular, self-documenting dataflows, that encode lineage/tracing and metadata. Runs and scales everywhere python does. 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。

projects.name: sglang
projects.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
projects.summaryZh: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models. 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.description: High-performance Inference and Deployment Toolkit for LLMs and VLMs based on PaddlePaddle
projects.summaryZh: High-performance Inference and Deployment Toolkit for LLMs and VLMs based on PaddlePaddle 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。

projects.name: ms-swift
projects.description: Use PEFT or Full-parameter to CPT/SFT/DPO/GRPO 600+ LLMs (Qwen3.6, DeepSeek-R1, GLM-5.1, InternLM3, Llama4, ...) and 300+ MLLMs (Qwen3-VL, Qwen3-Omni, InternVL3.5, Ovis2.5, GLM4.5v, Gemma4, Llava, Phi4, ...) (AAAI 2025).
projects.summaryZh: Use PEFT or Full-parameter to CPT/SFT/DPO/GRPO 600+ LLMs (Qwen3.6, DeepSeek-R1, GLM-5.1, InternLM3, Llama4, ...) and 300+ MLLMs (Qwen3-VL, Qwen3-Omni, InternVL3.5, Ovis2.5, GLM4.5v, Gemma4, Llava, Phi4, ...) (AAAI 2025). 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
